hook: Sex is the most reinforcing thing you can give a man — attention is the most reinforcing thing you can give a woman.
Men are giving women attention and validation without receiving sex in return — on a scale of billions every day.
If I can eliminate your options while keeping mine, I become the more powerful partner.
Women in sexually exclusive relationships are like the company store — their monopoly inflates the price.
A woman getting validation outside her relationship is comparable to a man getting sex outside his relationship.
